[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2021-03-31
[TITLE]: Brooklyn Beckham shares sweet childhood throwback of himself and dad David cuddling up as they nap together
[METADATA/INTRO]: BROOKLYN Beckham shared a sweet childhood throwback of himself and dad David cuddling up while napping together. The 22-year-old star was clearly feeling nostalgic as he dug through the archives to find the adorable snap....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: BROOKLYN Beckham shared a sweet childhood throwback of himself and dad David cuddling up while napping together. 
 The 22-year-old star was clearly feeling nostalgic as he dug through the archives to find the adorable snap. 
 In the black and white photo, David is topless and wearing a pair of baggy denim jeans as he snoozes with his young son. 
 Brooklyn is snuggled up in-between the star’s arms, also sound asleep in shorts and a T-Shirt. 
 The aspiring photographer tagged his famous dad as he posted the image to his Instagram Story, simply adding: “Love you, dad.” 
 David was chuffed to bits with the stroll down memory lane, reposting the image to his own social media page and adding: “Love you, Bust.”

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2017-07-25
[TITLE]: David Beckham and Brooklyn Beckham Are Just Dressing the Same Now | GQ
[METADATA/INTRO]: We've seen couples start dressing alike (on plenty of occasions). We've seen the inevitable glorification of once-bad-now-cool dad style. And today, we've seen those two worlds collide. David Beckham and his 18-year-old son Brooklyn were spotted in Los Angeles looking...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: We've seen couples start dressing alike (on plenty of occasions). We've seen the inevitable glorification of once-bad-now-cool dad style. And today, we've seen those two worlds collide. 
 David Beckham and his 18-year-old son Brooklyn were spotted in Los Angeles looking eerily similar in almost-matching outfits. It's no secret that Brooklyn Beckham has taken on some of his dad's style habits over the years—including flat caps, laid-back airport style, tank tops, camo jackets, and even bleached hair—but now, the father-son duo are basically style twins. 
 Both Beckham Sr. and Jr. wore white tees and jeans yesterday, which is about as simple as an outfit can get. But because we're talking about the Beckhams here, they make it look somehow both incredibly stylish and yet totally attainable. Slight differences showed that while these men are on the same wavelength, they definitely know how to spin it in a way that's right for them, which is the foundation of personal style.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2017-03-04
[TITLE]: David Beckham shares unseen baby pic and touching tribute to son Brooklyn on his 18th birthday - The Mirror
[METADATA/INTRO]: David Beckham shares unseen baby pic and touching tribute to son Brooklyn on his 18th birthday The footballer shared the adorable picture, and paid tribute to his "polite, handsome, driven young man"...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: He also shared a touching message with the picture, and casually dropped in the mildly embarrassing information that Brooklyn had a dependency on Irish group Boyzone as a child. 
 “So on this day 18 years ago this little man came into our lives.... To say we felt blessed is an understatement …” David wrote. 
 “From day one he never slept through the night the only way he would fall asleep is when I took him out in the car and it had to be BoyZone on the radio and he would drop right off.... 
 “Thank fully he now sleeps the whole night without needing a song ... Brooklyn has gone from this beautiful baby boy to become this handsome , polite and driven young man ..
